requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Series for PV Inverters — INEN Conformity and Ecuador Grid Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列——INEN合格评定及厄瓜多尔电网要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列——INEN合格評定及厄瓜多電網要求

summary.en: Ecuador's INEN conformity framework for PV inverters adopts IEC-based EMC standards. The primary EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment is IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment). IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) and the broader IEC 61000 series apply to harmonic emission and immunity requirements. For INEN conformity certification, EMC evidence must be based on the applicable IEC standards — not China domestic EMC standards. Because Ecuador's grid operates at 60 Hz (not 50 Hz), EMC and harmonic tests must be conducted at 60 Hz to be valid for Ecuador grid conditions; results obtained at 50 Hz under Chinese grid conditions may not be directly transferable. ARCERNNR and distribution companies may require EMC evidence as part of grid-connection technical documentation for microgeneración projects.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔INEN针对光伏逆变器的合格评定框架采用基于IEC的EMC标准。光伏功率变换设备的主要EMC标准为IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）。IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备谐波电流排放限值）及更广泛的IEC 61000系列适用于谐波排放和抗扰度要求。INEN合格评定认证的EMC证据须基于适用的IEC标准——而非中国国内EMC标准。由于厄瓜多尔电网运行于60 Hz（而非50 Hz），EMC和谐波测试须在60 Hz下进行才对厄瓜多尔电网条件有效；在中国电网条件下以50 Hz获得的结果可能不能直接适用。ARCERNNR和配电公司可能要求在微型发电项目并网技术文件中提供EMC证据。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多INEN針對光伏逆變器的合格評定框架採用基於IEC的EMC標準。光伏功率轉換設備的主要EMC標準為IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）。IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備諧波電流排放限值）及更廣泛的IEC 61000系列適用於諧波排放和抗擾度要求。INEN合格評定認證的EMC證據須基於適用的IEC標準——而非中國國內EMC標準。由於厄瓜多電網運行於60 Hz（而非50 Hz），EMC和諧波測試須在60 Hz下進行才對厄瓜多電網條件有效；在中國電網條件下以50 Hz取得的結果可能不能直接適用。ARCERNNR和配電公司可能要求在微型發電項目併網技術文件中提供EMC證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (adopted as INEN conformity basis)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility — broader immunity and emission requirements
NTE INEN / RTE INEN — Ecuador technical standards and regulations adopting IEC EMC requirements for PV inverters

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework at 50 Hz / 220/380 V. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as required by INEN Ecuador conformity. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for INEN conformity certification or ARCERNNR project submissions. Furthermore, 50 Hz-based EMC test results are not directly valid for Ecuador's 60 Hz grid.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国50 Hz / 220/380 V国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与INEN厄瓜多尔合格评定所要求的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调。仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书，不被接受为INEN合格评定认证或ARCERNNR项目提交的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。此外，基于50 Hz的EMC测试结果对厄瓜多尔60 Hz电网不直接有效。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國50 Hz / 220/380 V國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與INEN厄瓜多合格評定所要求的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調。僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書，不被接受為INEN合格評定認證或ARCERNNR項目提交的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。此外，基於50 Hz的EMC測試結果對厄瓜多60 Hz電網不直接有效。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes 50 Hz-based EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy INEN's IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for Ecuador conformity certification. The 60 Hz frequency difference is an additional gap: EMC and harmonic test results obtained at 50 Hz under Chinese grid conditions may not be valid for Ecuador's 60 Hz grid, and retesting at 60 Hz may be required by INEN or the ARCERNNR project engineer. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, conducted at 60 Hz and covering the specific inverter model at its Ecuador-configuration power rating; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report at 60 Hz for the model. Confirm with the INEN-accredited conformity body whether 60 Hz retesting is required relative to any existing 50 Hz IEC 62920 test reports held for other markets.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足厄瓜多尔合格评定认证的INEN IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。60 Hz频率差异是额外差距：在中国电网条件下以50 Hz获取的EMC和谐波测试结果，对厄瓜多尔60 Hz电网可能无效，INEN或ARCERNNR项目工程师可能要求在60 Hz下重新测试。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、在60 Hz下进行、涵盖特定逆变器型号厄瓜多尔配置功率等级的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号在60 Hz下的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。请向INEN认可的合格评定机构确认，相较于其他市场已有的50 Hz IEC 62920测试报告，是否需要重新进行60 Hz测试。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足厄瓜多合格評定認證的INEN IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。60 Hz頻率差異是額外差距：在中國電網條件下以50 Hz取得的EMC和諧波測試結果，對厄瓜多60 Hz電網可能無效，INEN或ARCERNNR項目工程師可能要求在60 Hz下重新測試。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、在60 Hz下進行、涵蓋特定逆變器型號厄瓜多配置功率等級的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號在60 Hz下的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。請向INEN認可的合格評定機構確認，相較於其他市場已有的50 Hz IEC 62920測試報告，是否需要重新進行60 Hz測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for INEN conformity certification (market entry gate); IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence at 60 Hz are the required basis; ARCERNNR and CNEL may require EMC evidence as part of microgeneración grid-connection documentation
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy INEN's IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for Ecuador conformity certification. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model at its 60 Hz Ecuador configuration before submitting for INEN conformity. Confirm with the INEN conformity body whether EMC test results at 50 Hz (from testing for other markets) are accepted or whether 60 Hz retesting is required. Verify current INEN technical regulations for PV inverters at normalizacion.gob.ec.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足厄瓜多尔合格评定认证的INEN IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在提交INEN合格评定前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号60 Hz厄瓜多尔配置的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请向INEN合格评定机构确认，针对其他市场在50 Hz下取得的EMC测试结果是否被接受，或是否需要重新进行60 Hz测试。请在normalizacion.gob.ec核实光伏逆变器的现行INEN技术法规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足厄瓜多合格評定認證的INEN IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在提交INEN合格評定前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號60 Hz厄瓜多配置的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請向INEN合格評定機構確認，針對其他市場在50 Hz下取得的EMC測試結果是否被接受，或是否需要重新進行60 Hz測試。請在normalizacion.gob.ec核實光伏逆變器的現行INEN技術法規。
